title: Daily Tips
tip: You are doing good — keep your routine light and consistent today.

title: Mindfulness
tip: Take 3 slow breaths. Inhale 4s, hold 2s, exhale 6s. Repeat x3.

title: Do / Don’t
tip: Do: communicate clearly • Don’t: rush decisions.

title: Today’s Luck
tip: Best window: late afternoon. Try a calming color.

title: Daily Matches
tip: Connect with someone who shares your curiosity.

title: Dating Tips
tip: Lead with empathy; ask one genuine question.

title: Career Tips
tip: Do one high-impact task before noon.
